AgreementContentModal.content:
1. This tool is intended only for legally authorized enterprise security construction and personal learning. To test its availability, please set up your own target environment.
2. When using this tool for testing, you must ensure that the activity complies with local laws and regulations and that you have obtained sufficient authorization. Do not scan unauthorized targets.
3. Reverse engineering, decompiling, attempting to decipher the source code, implanting backdoors, or distributing malware with this software is prohibited.
4. If you need to use Yakit for commercial purposes, please ensure that you have obtained official authorization; otherwise we will hold you liable.
If any of the prohibited activities above are discovered, we reserve the right to pursue legal liability.
If you engage in any illegal activity while using this tool, you shall bear the consequences yourself, and we shall not assume any legal or joint liability.
Before installing and using this tool, please carefully read and fully understand all terms.
Limitation, disclaimer, or other clauses affecting your material rights may be highlighted in bold or underlined form.
Unless you have fully read, completely understood, and accepted all terms of this agreement, do not install or use this tool. Your use, or any other express or implied acceptance of this agreement, shall be deemed that you have read and agreed to be bound by it.
